evals.expected_output: A comprehensive review report with: summary of the patch, categorized issues (BLOCKING/SUGGESTION/NIT), inline comments in file:line format, analysis of code quality, tests, documentation, and commit message. Output should be plain text ready to paste into Gerrit.

evals.prompt: hey can you review openstack patch 934521? it's supposed to fix a race condition in the oslo.utils timeutils module and i want to make sure it's good
evals.expected_output: A detailed review focusing on the race condition fix, with special attention to concurrency issues, thread safety, and test coverage. Should include the standard categorized format with inline comments.

evals.prompt: check change 927650 on gerrit. i think it might have security issues in the way it handles user input
evals.expected_output: A security-focused review highlighting any vulnerabilities (injection, XSS, resource leaks, etc.), plus standard code quality checks. Should flag security issues as BLOCKING if found.
